This internship offers a hands-on backend and systems experience where developers actively contribute to production systems, including backend services, APIs, data pipelines, and scraping infrastructure. Interns are expected to take ownership   understanding problems, writing functional code, debugging issues, and improving system performance   rather than passively observing, making it ideal for those aiming to become strong engineers early in their careers.

1. Build backend services, APIs, and data pipelines
2. Work on web scraping and automation for dynamic systems
3. Debug production issues and improve reliability/performance
4. Write clean, maintainable, testable code
5. Participate in code reviews and engineering discussions
6. Ship features end-to-end with ownership
7. Identify bugs, bottlenecks, and system improvements proactively
Success Milestones:
1. 30 Days: Understand systems, complete onboarding, start contributing
2. 60 Days: Ship a backend component or system improvement
3. 90 Days: Independently own and deliver scoped problems
4. End: Deliver real production work and earn PPO based on performance

summary: Program Objective: To train and develop skilled Unity Developers ready to contribute to real-world 3D Game Development and Simulation Projects. Program Structure Phase 1 - 2 Months Training (Hands-On
responsibilities: Program Objective:
To train and develop skilled Unity Developers ready to contribute to real-world 3D Game Development and Simulation Projects.
Program Structure
Phase 1 - 2 Months Training (Hands-On Projects)
Location: Raipur Office (as per availability)
Objective: Build strong practical knowledge of Unity Engine and 3D game development fundamentals.
Key Learning Areas:
1. Unity Interface & Project Structure
2. C# Scripting in Unity
3. 3D Object Manipulation
4. Physics, Collisions, and Animation Systems
5. Lighting, Materials, Shaders
6. UI Development in Unity
7. Prefabs & Asset Management
8. Input Handling (Keyboard, Mouse, Touch)
9. Basic Multiplayer Concepts
10. Building and Exporting Projects
Final Training Project: Build a simple interactive 3D game or simulation.
Phase 2 - 4 Months On-Site Internship
Location: RJPT Informatics Pvt Ltd - Raipur Office
Objective: Apply learned skills by contributing to real-time projects related to 3D Simulation Software and Games.
Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:
1. Work on ongoing projects under guidance of senior developers.
2. Develop features/modules in Unity using advanced C# scripting.
3. Implement optimized game mechanics.
4. Integrate external APIs and SDKs as needed.
5. Collaborate with designers, artists, and other developers.
6. Participate in code reviews and team discussions.
7. Test and debug code to meet industry standards.
1. Document project progress regularly.
2. Performance Review: Monthly evaluation by project manager.
3. Eligibility Criteria
4. Educational Background: Bachelor's or Diploma in Computer Science, IT, Game Development, or related fields.
5. Strong knowledge of C# scripting.
6. Understanding of OOP concepts and game programming paradigms.
7. Familiarity with Unity Editor and 3D game development basics.
8. Experience working with version control (Git).
9. Passion for 3D game development and simulations.
10. Good problem-solving attitude and commitment.
11. Serious candidates only.
Program Outcome
1. Industry-ready Unity Developer.
2. Hands-on experience in professional game/simulation development.
3. Strong portfolio with training project + contribution to real projects.
4. Certificate of Internship Completion from RJPT Informatics.
Important Notes
This is a serious, on-site internship program (Raipur Office) after training.
No stipend provided during the training period. Stipend possible during the internship phase based on performance (decided by management).
Only motivated candidates should apply.

summary: Zarle Infotech is hiring a Software Engineer to join an international SaaS project in the retail-tech space, working on a live production platform used by large global retail and FMCG brands. This is
responsibilities: Zarle Infotech is hiring a Software Engineer to join an international SaaS project in the retail-tech space, working on a live production platform used by large global retail and FMCG brands. This is a hands-on engineering role where data accuracy, system reliability, and edge-case handling are critical, as the platform replaces manual, spreadsheet-driven workflows by ingesting structured enterprise data, transforming it into retailer-specific formats, validating complex business rules, and automating submission and tracking of promotional campaigns. The system directly impacts real products in real markets   when it works, promotions run smoothly across stores; when it doesn't, pricing errors occur   making precision essential. Strong English communication is required, as the role involves regular collaboration with international teams on a backend-heavy, data-driven system designed to streamline thousands of retailer campaigns efficiently and reliably.
Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:
1. Design and implement backend APIs to process structured data and enforce business rules.
2. Build and maintain data transformation logic that converts raw inputs into validated, structured formats.
3. Debug and resolve production issues related to data accuracy, performance, or system reliability.
4. Identify and fix bugs related to data accuracy, performance, or system behavior.
5. Participate in code reviews and follow clean coding practices.
6. Work closely with senior engineers and stakeholders to understand requirements and implement solutions.
7. Ensure proper testing of edge cases before deployment.
8. Contribute to deployment and infrastructure improvements when required.

- System Design: Contribute to designing scalable, reliable, and low-latency backend architectures.
- Testing & Validation: Assist in building testing frameworks to validate system performance and accuracy.
Requirements/Skills:
- Strong proficiency in Python (3.x)
- Familiarity with Pandas, NumPy, or similar data-processing tools
- Basic understanding of REST APIs and backend frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, or Django)
- Knowledge of Git/GitHub for version control
- Understanding of asynchronous programming (preferred but not mandatory)
- Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail

name: 3D Game Asset Artist
degree: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
summary: Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include: 1. Design and develop 3D assets such as game objects, environment elements, and character models using Blender. 2. Optimize models for real-time
responsibilities: Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:
1. Design and develop 3D assets such as game objects, environment elements, and character models using Blender.
2. Optimize models for real-time performance by reducing polygon count and preparing textures.
3. Export and test assets in Unity to ensure proper appearance and performance in the application.
Requirements:
1. Proficiency in Blender 3.x or 4.x at an intermediate level, including modeling, UV unwrapping, applying modifiers, and exporting FBX files.
2. Basic understanding of game asset optimization including triangle counts, LOD concepts, and texture atlasing.
3. Knowledge of UV unwrapping using Smart UV Project and manual UV editing.
4. Experience with texture baking in Blender including diffuse, normal, and AO baking.
5. Ability to export clean FBX files with embedded textures.
Nice to have:
1. Experience with AI 3D tools such as Meshy AI, Tripo3D, or CSM.
2. Basic knowledge of Rigify or Mixamo auto-rigging.
3. Familiarity with Substance Painter or Quixel Mixer for PBR texturing.
4. Basic understanding of Unity including importing FBX and setting up materials in URP.
5. Experience with ZBrush or Sculptris for high-poly sculpting reference.
What you do not need:
1. Game development experience.
2. Coding or programming skills.
3. Prior internship experience.
4. Deep knowledge of Unity beyond basic FBX import.
